title: Many Bricks
body:
## Description:
Many Bricks is a simple yet versatile Minecraft mod that brings a wide variety of new brick options to your builds! Whether you're crafting medieval castles, cozy cottages, or modern cityscapes, Many Bricks adds a wealth of decorative blocks to enhance your structures. With this mod, you can use the stone cutter to craft bricks, creating an extensive palette textures for unique brick designs. Each new brick type can be seamlessly integrated into your builds, making it easy to add depth, contrast, and variety to any project.

## Features:

New Brick Variants: Create bricks in multiple textures to match your vision.

Stone Cutter Integration: Craft the new bricks directly with the stone cutter, maintaining the balance and simplicity of Minecraft's core mechanics.

Survival-Friendly: All brick types are crafted using in-game materials, making it easy to obtain in survival mode.

Endless Building Options: Ideal for builders looking to expand their block palette without disrupting the Minecraft aesthetic.


If you would like to support me financially consider paypal :)
